title: Wood Enjoyer
body:
📦 **Installation**

-No library mod required.

-Currently only available on Forge, Fabric port *might* come in the future.

 
🌳 **Features**

-New trees may generate on Forest, End midlands and highlands.

-*Milling* enchantment for axes that makes the axe drop planks from logs (more than 4 planks).

-Fortune enchantment on axes actually work on modded logs (axe may drop more than 1 log).

-Everything that is mentioned on the gallery



🧩 **Compat**

-Just Enough Items with recipes

-Corail Woodcutter with recipes


🌐 **Language**

-🇨🇳 Simplified Chinese by junshengxie
